thought.text:
Okay, I will generate a modern landing page for a coffee shop in the current directory. I'll use `npm create vite@latest . -- -y --template react` to start, and ensure I use Tailwind CSS and Lucide React icons. I'll also follow the premium aesthetic rules in CLAUDE.md.

First, I need to create the project using Vite.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"security_risk":"MEDIUM","summary":"Create a new React project using Vite.","command":"npm create vite@latest . -- -y --template react"}

summary: Create a new React project using Vite.
